title: Customize my resume for a senior leadership role

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Customize my resume for a senior leadership role

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
[Full Name]
[Address]
[Phone number]
[Email]

Objective:
To obtain a senior leadership role in a reputable organization where I can fully utilize my expertise and experience in leading teams, driving strategic initiatives and delivering results.

Skills:
- Extensive leadership experience with strong analytical skills
- Excellent communication, interpersonal, and team building skills
- Proven ability to develop and execute strategic plans to achieve organizational goals
- Keen understanding of financial management, budgeting, and forecasting
- Strong problem-solving skills with a track record of resolving complex business challenges
- Expertise in driving innovation and managing change within organizations

Experience:

[Current/Previous job title and company]
[Date of employment]

- Led a team of [Number] professionals to achieve business objectives and drive innovation in the organization
- Developed and implemented strategic plans to increase revenue and improve operational efficiency, resulting in [Result].
- Successfully managed a budget of [Amount] and delivered cost savings of [Savings amount].
- Developed and maintained strong relationships with key stakeholders, ensuring effective collaboration and communication between teams.
- Implemented successful change management initiatives to improve organizational culture and increase employee engagement.

[Previous job title and company]
[Date of employment]

- Achieved significant revenue growth by leading a team of [Number] professionals in the development and execution of strategic sales plans.
- Developed and implemented new processes and procedures to improve operational efficiency, reducing costs by [Cost saving amount].
- Fostered a culture of innovation and collaboration by promoting cross-functional teams and regular communication between departments.
- Oversaw the training and development of team members, resulting in improved performance and high employee engagement.
- Developed and maintained strong relationships with key clients, resulting in a high level of customer satisfaction and repeat business.

Education:

[Degree] in [Major] from [University], [Date of completion]

Certification:
[Certification name], [Certification body], [Date of completion]

References:
Available upon request.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: can you please review my resume and suggest effective bullet points ?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I'd be happy to help you review your resume and suggest effective bullet points. However, I would need to see your current resume in order to provide specific feedback and suggestions. Could you please provide me with a copy of your resume?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure, here are some suggestions for effective bullet points for the Head of Business Development role:

- Spearheaded the growth of the business through the development and execution of innovative sales and marketing strategies, resulting in a [percentage/increase/revenue].
- Fostered a culture of collaboration and teamwork amongst cross-functional teams, resulting in a [percentage/increase] in productivity and increased efficiency.
- Identified and pursued new business opportunities, resulting in a successful expansion into new markets and a [percentage/increase in revenue].
- Negotiated strategic partnerships with key clients, resulting in a [percentage/increase in business growth and increased market share].
- Utilized data analytics to drive decisions and optimize sales performance, resulting in a [percentage/increase in revenue] and a [percentage/increase in customer satisfaction].
- Successfully managed a team of [number] business development professionals and provided mentorship and guidance to aid in their professional development and growth.
- Presented regular performance reports to the executive team, highlighting key metrics and areas of improvement.
- Identified and reduced operational inefficiencies within the business development process, resulting in a [percentage/increase in cost savings].
- Represented the company at industry events and conferences, increasing brand awareness and driving new business opportunities. 
- Developed and implemented key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure the effectiveness of the business development strategy, resulting in continuous improvement and a [percentage/increase in ROI].
- Developed and maintained strong partnerships with key stakeholders, resulting in a high level of customer satisfaction and a [percentage/increase in customer retention].

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: can you please review my resume and suggest effective bullet points ?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Sure, please provide me with a copy of your current resume and I will review it and provide some suggestions for effective bullet points.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Head of Business Development
OYO Arabia
Jan 2022 till present - Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
 
•  Building and nurturing a high-performance team of 68 Personnel to achieve business goals
•  Recruiting, mentoring & training supply acquisition, enterprise sales & corporate partnership teams, resulting in minimized churn rate by 25%
•  Developing processes to launch corporate accounts setting the vision and execution of the launch and live operations considering the nature of the accounts
•  Maintaining & building strategic partner relationships and networking programs implementing customer success initiatives contributing to upsell opportunities 
•  Developed and executed regional business development strategy elevated partnerships with government & private sector entities effectively generating $ 78M incremental revenue 
•  Building Annual Operating plans ( AOP ) , resource & cost planning  and improved forecast accuracy by 95% MOM
•  Spearheaded operations digitization project & reduced on-ground manpower by 37% with new tools, automations & associated processes
 
Area Supply Manager
OYO Saudi Arabia
March 2020 till December 2021 – Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
 
•  Developed strategy for B2B supply acquisition
      in KSA increasing portfolio margins by 37 %
•  Acquiring & negotiating with suppliers whilst delivering an average of double-digit margins for the portfolio.
•  Plan & oversee business development efforts with a goal to onboard high-quality budget hotels on to OYO Network
•  Managing a team of 35 business development executives while ensuring constant flow of supply growth & revenue enhancement.
•  Identifying trends, building short- & long-term sales pipeline in accordance with targets
•  Data driven decision making along with cross functional conjunction maintained with all teams to ensure achieving business objectives
•  Key Account Management of 60+ B2B partners end to end generating annualized revenues of $ 16.7M by providing customized service and quick resolutions of concerns
•  Improving profitability & contribution margin % by renegotiating commission rates with supply network directing impacting the contribution region
•  Implemented asset-specific solutions such as targeted promotions and tailored pricing to improve profitability, resulting in portfolio revenue increase of 30%
•  Scaled up market size from 8K to 11K + serviceable rooms impacting
47 % growth in revenue

Business Development Manager
 
OYO Saudi Arabia
 
Oct 2018 till Feb 2020 – Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
 
•  Identifying potential partners and executing the 3-step process of auditing, negotiating, contracting and transforming hotels into a fully operational OYO rooms property
•  Responsible for managing existing partners and cross-selling Value- Added Services improvising OYO take rate
•  Onboarded 80 + supply hotel partners within 6 months
•  Coordination and follow up with the cross-functional teams such as operations, marketing, pricing, customer support, finance, etc. to ensure smooth functioning of hotels on day-to-day basis
•  Plan and coordinate administrative procedures and systems and devise ways to streamline processes
 
Strategy Associate
 
Otto Bock Healthcare
 
May 2018 till Oct 2018 - Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
 
•  Portfolio management of key government accounts clocking in revenue value of USD 21 million
•  Developing and research the marketing & client acquisition strategy for the company in line with company objectives.
•  Refined user acquisition marketing strategy resulting in 20 % increase in lead generation
•  Identified & prioritized new external partnerships based on internal requirement & cross functional leadership management
•  Analyzing performance of dealer partners across 39 KPIs and drove change management for better profitability
•  Collaborated closely with government bodies to co-create dynamic and sustainable business models, aimed at fostering partnerships with private entities
 
Business Development Analyst
 
Smart Global Consulting
 
September 2016 till December 2017 – Tampa, Florida

•  Building and leading the business development executives & manager team through effective performance management systems like review meetings, performance monitoring and discussions, etc
•  Conducted multiple Kaizens with different stakeholders to identify business gaps and identify new opportunities for profitability /areas for expanding business
•  Developed & implemented account development strategies to enhance growth in existing key accounts, driving a revenue increase of 25% resulting in $ 27M channel sales increase
•  Responsible for BTL and PR & coordinating administrative procedures and systems and devise ways to streamline processes.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Here are some suggestions for effective bullet points for your resume:

Head of Business Development:

- Built and nurtured a high-performance team of 68 personnel, resulting in a minimized churn rate by 25%.
- Developed processes to launch corporate accounts, effectively setting the vision and execution of the launch and live operations for these accounts.
- Developed and executed regional business development strategy, elevating partnerships with government and private sector entities to generate an incremental revenue of $78M.
- Achieved improved forecast accuracy by 95% month over month through development of Annual Operating Plans (AOP), resource and cost planning.
- Spearheaded operations digitization project and reduced on-ground manpower by 37% with new tools, automations, and processes.

Area Supply Manager:

- Developed strategy for B2B supply acquisition, increasing portfolio margins by 37%.
- Managed a team of 35 business development executives, ensuring constant flow of supply growth and revenue enhancement.
- Improved profitability and contribution margin % by renegotiating commission rates with supply network, directing impacting the contribution region.
- Implemented asset-specific solutions such as targeted promotions and tailored pricing to improve profitability, resulting in portfolio revenue increase of 30%.
- Scaled up market size from 8K to 11K + serviceable rooms, impacting 47% growth in revenue.

Business Development Manager:

- Onboarded 80+ supply hotel partners within 6 months.
- Coordinated and followed up with cross-functional teams such as operations, marketing, pricing, customer support, finance, etc. to ensure smooth functioning of hotels on a day-to-day basis.
- Planned and coordinated administrative procedures and systems, driving ways to streamline processes.
- Responsible for managing existing partners and cross-selling value-added services, improvising OYO take rate.

Strategy Associate:

- Developed and researched marketing and client acquisition strategy for the company in line with its objectives.
- Identified and prioritized new external partnerships based on internal requirements and cross-functional leadership management.
- Analyzed performance of dealer partners across 39 KPIs and drove change management for increased profitability.
- Collaborated closely with government bodies to co-create dynamic and sustainable business models, fostering partnerships with private entities.

Business Development Analyst:

- Built and led the business development executives and manager team through effective performance management systems like review meetings, performance monitoring and discussions, etc.
- Conducted multiple kaizens with different stakeholders to identify business gaps and identify new opportunities for profitability/areas for expanding business.
- Developed and implemented account development strategies to enhance growth in existing key accounts, driving a revenue increase of 25% resulting in $27M channel sales increase.
- Responsible for BTL and PR and coordinated administrative procedures and systems, devising ways to streamline processes.
